roa.docketEntryComment: SIGNED APPLICATION & ORDER RE: DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS, FILED

/TWS/CH1 ISS PROB  3 Y PJ 30 D/CTS  1 /SWAPD  02-21-12/PF460NEW/MOP1/IID1 Y/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:120/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SETFORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/X: THE SAME SENTENCE IS IMPOSED ON COUNT TWO AND WILL BE CONCURRENT TO COUNT ONE,/654: 2/

/TRL PHASE/CA/X: AT 10:50AM, AFTER FINAL INSTRUCTIONS FROM THE COURT, THEJURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE,/X: AT 12:15, THE JURY RETURNS GUILTY VERDICTSON BOTH COUNTS,/X: AFTER LUNCH, THE COURT CONDUCTS A TRIAL ON THE PRIOR CONVICTIONS AND FINDS THE ALLEGATION OF A PRIOR CONVICTION TO BE TRUE,/X: DEFENSE WILL NOT WAIVE TIME FOR SENTENCING,/CONTD: SENTENCE/
/CAL: JURY TRIAL/X: THE DA DISMISSES COUNT 3 - 22100(B)VC, INFRACTION, ASTHE PEOPLE   ARE UNABLE TO MEET THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF ON THIS COUNT/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE JURY INSTRUCTIONS/DOP/
